description: Suitable for monitoring NVIDIA GPU resource overviews in AI intelligent computing scenarios. Dependent components: dcgm-exporter:3.3.0-3.2.0-ubuntu22.04, prometheus:v2.39.1, grafana:10.3.3

panels.title: Host Allocated GPU Card Details (Node Level)

targets.expr: (sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{pod!="",Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip))/(sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip)+sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip)) * 100

title: AI Intelligent Computing - GPU Resource Monitoring Overview
